title: Peter Rabbit Children’s Gardening Set
features: PERFECT FOR YOUNG CHILDREN: This bright and cheerful 5-piece gardening set is the perfect size for young children. The set includes a mini rake, spade, watering can and gloves which come in a sturdy carry-bag which includes lots of pockets to store your tools and garden treasures.

BUILT TO LAST: The high-quality tool set is made from strong and sturdy wood and metal and has been built to last being used outside in the garden. The sweet children’s gardening gloves are crafted from a hard-wearing cotton and nylon mix material and have padded non-slip palm and finger grips along with comfortable elasticated wrists to keep dirt and debris out of the glove. The gloves can easily be washed after use to keep them clean.

GREAT GARDEN ACTIVITY: This garden tool set is perfect for keeping little hands busy in the garden. The smooth wooden handles on the tools are comfortable for young children to hold and the watering can is made from sturdy but lightweight plastic and is just the right size for small hands to use. The carry-bag is crafted from tough nylon and comes with seven storage pockets and handles.

OUTDOOR FUN: Encourage screen-free time for children by promoting outside activities and an interest in gardening and nature. This gardening set is perfect for children to enjoy digging, planting and playing outside.

OFFICIAL LICENSED GIFT: The character artwork on this bright and cheerful children’s gardening set makes this a perfect present for fans of Peter Rabbit. The set is an official licensed Beatrix Potter gift.
description: Product Description This bright and cheerful 5-piece gardening set is the perfect size for young children. The set includes a mini rake, spade, watering can and gloves which come in a sturdy carry-bag which includes lots of pockets to store your tools and garden treasures. Designed in the UK. Safety Warning Not Suitable for Children Under 36 Months

specifications_table.Included Components: Garden Gloves, Rake, Spade, Storage Bag, Watering Can
